upstream_note: v2: full 6x6. Top-level cells are the openai-egress row for v1 compatibility; the full grid is under upstreams.<egress>.cells keyed by ingress dialect.
cap_note: APISIX 3.17.0 ai-proxy has no native Gemini generateContent or Cohere provider, and no OpenAI-to-Anthropic/Bedrock converter (only anthropic->openai); other cells are grey by that capability limit (ai-proxy/base.lua, ai-protocols/converters/init.lua)

openai.verdict_note: HTTP 200, passthrough (same dialect, no translation required); round trip to the mock's openai endpoint confirmed

hardware: AWS m7g.2xlarge (Graviton3, 8 cores / 32 GB). Gateway pinned to 4 cores, mock+loadgen on the other 4, Ubuntu 24.04. One dedicated box per gateway.
